infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Alenio uses the camera to capture photos inside the app before you publish them.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Alenio uses the microphone to record audio tracks that the app attaches to your creations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Alenio accesses your photo library to generate thumbnails for your videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Alenio saves media you export from the app into your photo library.
